column1: # Exact per-test expectations for the gVisor syscall conformance lane.
# Bootstrapped from the QEMU AArch64 reference (gVisor pin c30a6d1b,
# run 2026-07-19) over the opt-in target set in targets.txt; regenerate with
# expectations-init on a pin bump and review the diff. Reference-PASS tests
# are PASS (elfuse must match); tests that do not run cleanly on the reference
# are EXCLUDE with the observed reason.
